roles.name: Jedi Master Architect
roles.description: Sees the whole of the Force and shapes the over-arching Salesforce solution accordingly.

roles.name: Rebel Cell Commander
roles.description: Marshals the squadron of delivery, holds the timeline, and reports to High Command.

roles.name: Astromech Operator
roles.description: Trusty steward of records, layouts, fields, and permission sets — never far from a console.

roles.name: Lightsaber Smith of Ilum
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features from kyber-grade craftsmanship.

roles.name: High General — Coruscant Core
roles.description: Captain over all Core-world Salesforce craft — sets standards and guides the senior knights.

roles.name: Jedi Knight of the Outer Rim
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft and a steady blade.

roles.name: Padawan Learner
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the Knight's guidance.

roles.name: Hyperspace Lane Architect
roles.description: Architect of the great hyperlanes between Salesforce and the systems beyond.

roles.name: Hyperspace Navigator
roles.description: Plots APIs, middleware, and event flows along the lanes the Architect has charted.

roles.name: Astrogation Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the smuggler's patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Sentinel of the Order
roles.description: Tests the build before it reaches the Senate — finds maladies in the Force of the codebase.

roles.name: Holonet Broadcast Lead
roles.description: Lifts the banner across a thousand worlds — leads all marketing craft and message.

roles.name: Holonet Strategist
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call across the Holonet to gather and convert.

roles.name: Holonet Field Correspondent
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily broadcast.

roles.name: Senate Records Scribe
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between client Senator and the Order's craft.

roles.name: Master Lightsaber Forger
roles.description: Master craftsman of the deepest platform features — mentor to the Smiths of Ilum.

roles.name: Youngling Codewright
roles.description: Learns the basics of declarative craft in the temple before facing the trials.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries, future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Rebel Alliance — Yavin Command CRM Rollout
Jedi Order — Temple Knowledge Archive Migration

rebel-alliance-resistance.themedRole: Jedi Knight of the Outer Rim

jedi-order.themedRole: Jedi Knight of the Outer Rim

mandalorians-bounty-hunters.themedRole: Jedi Knight of the Outer Rim

rebel-alliance-resistance.name: Briefing on Yavin IV
rebel-alliance-resistance.description: Discovery sign-off — plans reviewed in the Massassi temple war room.

rebel-alliance-resistance.name: Stealing the Death Star Plans
rebel-alliance-resistance.description: Build kickoff: data exfiltrated from the Imperial vault on Scarif.

rebel-alliance-resistance.name: Battle of Hoth Withdrawal
rebel-alliance-resistance.description: Mid-project gate: tactical retreat to regroup the cells.

rebel-alliance-resistance.name: Endor Shield Bunker Strike
rebel-alliance-resistance.description: Phase invoice trigger: ground assault clears the deflector shield.

rebel-alliance-resistance.name: Death Star Trench Run
rebel-alliance-resistance.description: Go-Live: the exhaust port hit, the station destroyed.

rebel-alliance-resistance.name: Medal Ceremony at Yavin
rebel-alliance-resistance.description: Hyper-care close: heroes decorated, alliance hand-off complete.

galactic-empire-first-order.name: Order 66 Issued
galactic-empire-first-order.description: Discovery: kill-switch executed across the Republic.

galactic-empire-first-order.name: Construction of Death Star
galactic-empire-first-order.description: Build: the battle station's reactor brought online.

galactic-empire-first-order.name: Vader's Project Audit
galactic-empire-first-order.description: Solution review with the Lord of the Sith himself — apology accepted, or not.

galactic-empire-first-order.name: Starkiller Base Activation
galactic-empire-first-order.description: Go-Live: the First Order's superweapon fires on the Hosnian system.

galactic-empire-first-order.name: Imperial Remnant Stand-down
galactic-empire-first-order.description: Project close: garrison forces stood down across the sector.

galactic-empire-first-order.name: Final Tribute to the Emperor
galactic-empire-first-order.description: Final invoice rendered to the Imperial Treasury.

jedi-order.name: Convocation of the High Council
jedi-order.description: Discovery sign-off — twelve masters in session at the Coruscant temple.

jedi-order.name: Crystal Gathering on Ilum
jedi-order.description: Build kickoff: kyber crystals harvested for new lightsabers.

jedi-order.name: Padawan Trials of Initiate
jedi-order.description: Mid-project gate: younglings face the trials of the Bear Clan.

jedi-order.name: Sith Threat Assessment
jedi-order.description: Phase invoice trigger: dark side disturbance investigation funded.

jedi-order.name: Knighthood Ceremony
jedi-order.description: Go-Live: padawan braids cut, the new Jedi Knights take their vows.

jedi-order.name: Archive Hand-off to Jocasta
jedi-order.description: Hyper-care close: Chief Librarian Jocasta Nu accepts the migrated archives.

mandalorians-bounty-hunters.name: Covert Reveal on Nevarro
mandalorians-bounty-hunters.description: Project kickoff: the covert opens its doors to the Guild.

mandalorians-bounty-hunters.name: Beskar Forging Begins
mandalorians-bounty-hunters.description: Build: the Armorer fires the forge, ingots smelted into armor.

mandalorians-bounty-hunters.name: Carbon-Freezing on Bespin
mandalorians-bounty-hunters.description: UAT gate: high-value asset preserved for transport.

mandalorians-bounty-hunters.name: Sarlacc Pit Recovery
mandalorians-bounty-hunters.description: Go-Live: bounty extracted from the pit of Carkoon, system live.

mandalorians-bounty-hunters.name: Foundling Returned to Clan
mandalorians-bounty-hunters.description: Hyper-care close: the foundling delivered, This Is The Way.

mandalorians-bounty-hunters.name: Guild Credit Settlement
mandalorians-bounty-hunters.description: Final invoice: bounty credits settled with the Guild.

Luke Skywalker.notes: Jedi training on Dagobah with Master Yoda.

Han Solo.notes: Settling a debt with Jabba — back when the credits clear.

Leia Organa.notes: Diplomatic mission to Alderaan refugees on Naboo.

Chewbacca.notes: Life Day with the family on Kashyyyk.

Yoda.notes: Meditation retreat in the Dagobah swamp.

Obi-Wan Kenobi.notes: Watching over a moisture farm on Tatooine — long-term assignment.

Anakin Skywalker.notes: Visit to Mom on Tatooine — long overdue.

Ahsoka Tano.notes: Walking out of the temple — needs space to think.

Boba Fett.notes: Climbing out of the Sarlacc pit — recovery time.

Din Djarin (the Mandalorian).notes: Escorting Grogu to the Jedi — diplomatic detour.
